biological_replicate: we used NIH-3T3-Src cells, which are Src-transformed mouse fibroblasts
technical_replicate: the experiments were performed in triplicate
experimental_design: we first studied the impact of translation inhibitors in invadosome formation
factor_value: Anisomycin and cycloheximide (CHX) treatment in concentration-range and time-course assays
number_of_fractions: If no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described anywhere in the text
number_of_biological_replicates: Two distinct cell lines are used
